name: Hamspater
short_description: Hamspater is a simple side-scrolling roguelike game that requires control. To keep your hamster alive and attack effectively, you must focus on movement control. Defeat slimes and survive for 20 minutes to get more gold.
detailed_description:
Hamspater is a simple side-scrolling roguelike game that requires control.

To keep your hamster alive and attack effectively, you must focus on movement control.

[▼ How to Play]

1. Hunt slimes to equip weapons in the Left / Right / Jump / Drop slots and evolve them.

 ★ Move left or right controls to fire Left / Right weapons faster.

 ★ Jump (or drop) controls to fire useful Jump / Drop weapons.

2. Defeat slimes and survive for 20 minutes to get more gold.

3. Upgrade with the gold you get to survive more easily and hunt slimes more efficiently.

 ★ Use gold to unlock other characters or increase the number of rerolls.

※ A total of 24 weapons, 3 characters, and 3 stages are available.

※ I have prepared this game so that you can play it using a keyboard and mouse, a gamepad, or a joystick.

※ This game is only available in English, but its simple design makes it easy to understand.
